creator: theraven@FreeBSD.org
text: The log file is also a bit confusing.  It appeas to be passing -fobjc-runtime=gnustep-1.8 to the builds.  The latest changes set this to gnustep-2.0, which was an ABI-breaking change and is responsible for triggering the issues with BFD ld.  Please make sure that this is what you see in the compile lines when testing.
